query:
SELECT 
  DATE(u.createdAt) as registration_date,
  COUNT(*) as new_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as users_with_reviews
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT userId FROM reviews) r ON r.userId = u.id
GROUP BY DATE(u.createdAt)
ORDER BY registration_date DESC;
